## Summary
Explain clearly what changed and why.

## Related issue(s)
Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Problem formulation
- [ ] Literature / PRISMA
- [ ] Objectives / Hypotheses
- [ ] Methodology
- [ ] Experiment
- [ ] Results
- [ ] Writing
- [ ] Advisor correction
- [ ] Maintenance / config

## Files changed
- `docs/...`
- `references/...`
- `experiments/...`
- `notebooks/...`
- `reports/...`
- `src/...`
- `tests/...`

## Evidence linked
- [ ] Corpus / paper evidence
- [ ] PRISMA output
- [ ] Experiment config
- [ ] Notebook
- [ ] Table / figure
- [ ] Advisor comment
- [ ] TRL-related evidence

## Traceability
Problem / question / objective / hypothesis / experiment / thesis section affected:

## Checklist
- [ ] The change is aligned with the current thesis scope
- [ ] Claims are supported by evidence
- [ ] The relevant issue is linked
- [ ] Reproducibility impact was considered
- [ ] If experimental, config + notebook + output artifact were updated
- [ ] If writing-related, the section is linked to supporting evidence
- [ ] If methodology-related, coherence with objectives/hypotheses was checked

## Risks / open questions
Describe remaining risks, assumptions, or unresolved issues.
